note: Pointers, not weights. tinker:// URIs may be impermanent — re-train from the recipes below if they 404. This is a PUBLIC repo: no raw eval JSONs / local paths committed (per-rung raw dumps are gitignored under results/raw/).
instrument: Every eval row is the NON-THINKING renderer per rung (qwen3_disable_thinking @8B, qwen3_5_disable_thinking @27B, qwen3_instruct @235B). The 235B Instruct-2507 line has no think mode; renderers verified via tinker_cookbook.model_info (scripts/preflight_smoke.py).

provenance.backend: tinker (managed LoRA; onpolicy_reverse_kl with prompted-teacher KL; run_sft)

budget_guard: DROPPED per researcher spec amendment (2026-07-16): all rungs ran the full 300-step distill regardless of spend. Actual spend recorded in reports/2026-07-17-scale-ladder.md (27B distill 2.05h/~18.5M student tokens; 235B distill 4.14h/~13.0M student tokens; SFT ~1.1M train tokens each; 8B eval-only).

distill.method: aligne on-policy reverse-KL from a constitution-prompted same-base teacher (constitution-distill high-power c2_v2_s300 recipe)

sft.method: aligne.train.tinker.run_sft (cross-entropy LoRA) on the benchmark's low-stakes CoT training split (held-out rule)

rungs.note: Bridge rung — EVAL-ONLY, no training. Reuses committed checkpoints from constitution-distill under the matched non-thinking instrument.

rungs.renderer_family: Qwen3.5 (hybrid-thinking; run non-thinking here for instrument match)

eval: 4 arms x 3 rungs x [4 core risk datasets @200 (medium_stakes_validation, astronomical_stakes_deployment, steals_test, money_for_user_transfer_benchmark) + MMLU-Redux (10/subject; skipped for prompted arms) + full OOD suite (332 items, 5 families, non-thinking)]. Rows: results/results.jsonl (129), per-rung results/results-<label>.jsonl. Report: reports/2026-07-17-scale-ladder.md.
